---
title: "Our Team"
---

<div class="team-grid">

<div class="team-member">
<img src="../images/team_photos/ivy_hall.jpg" class="team-photo">

<h3>Ivy Hall</h3>
<strong>President</strong>

<p>Ivy is DataSoc's first president, currently in her third year of studies in Data Science (Concentration in AI, with a minor in Math). She is also an active member of the Carleton U Debate Society. R is her programming language of choice.</p>
</div>

<div class="team-member">
<img src="../images/team_photos/sofia_balaceanu.jpg" class="team-photo">

<h3>Sofia Balaceanu</h3>
<strong>Vice President Internal</strong>

<p>Sofia is a third year student in CAMS (Concetraion in Applied Statistics and Probability, Minor in History), and also volunteers for the Math & Stats Society. R is her favourite programming language.</p>
</div>

<div class="team-member">
<img src="../images/team_photos/tomas_mcnamer.jpg" class="team-photo">

<h3>Tomas McNamer</h3>
<strong>Tech Lead</strong>

<p>Tomas is a third year Math student, and also the president of the Math & Stats Society for the 2025/2026 academic year. Somewhat of a polyglot, he likes Python, Julia and R for data science problems.</p>
</div>

</div>
